text: Shamsul submitted an article to IEEE Transactions on Materials and Device Reliability
Shamsul published a Q1 review paper in the Journal of Battery Energy.
Shamsul presented his research article at the International Conference on Mechanical and Renewable Energy 2025.
Shamsul successfully defended his thesis and graduated with a BSc in Mechanical Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology.
Shamsul joined the Nanomaterials and Energy Storage System (NESS) Lab at CUET as a Research Intern
